title: Spanish Paella
description: A traditional Spanish dish made with saffron-infused rice, vegetables, and savory meats. This paella recipe serves 4 and takes about 45 minutes to prepare and cook.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the grapefruit, tomatoes, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pan. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the rice to the pan and stir to coat with the oil and mix with the vegetables.
Add the chicken broth to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
